content: Mobile-first financial dashboard component patterns: domain-centric not atomic. Key components: BalanceSummaryCard (top KPI), TransactionList (virtualized for performance), CategoryBreakdown (chart), FaturamentoGauge (MEI-specific limit tracker), ObrigacoesTimeline (calendar view). Use TanStack Virtual for long transaction lists. Recharts or Chart.js for data viz. Keep calculation logic in hooks not components. Bottom nav for mobile (max 5 items). Sticky header with balance. Pull-to-refresh for mobile UX.
